text:
I almost ignored this chart, then I checked the copper backdrop. NRED is not just another small-cap ticker when the macro tape is arguing supply, not vibes.

#oott #omegle #nolimits AKAM ALNY IONS
quoted_text:
Ayo metals crowd, Bernstein is basically saying copper has macro noise but physical tightness underneath

Yes, higher energy costs, Middle East tension, a stronger U.S. dollar and hawkish Fed expectations can pressure commodities short term. But copper is not only trading on vibes

Bernstein also points to reduced mine production guidance and U.S. stockpiling tightening the physical market

That is the part I care about

By 2030, they forecast copper around $10,700/t as structural deficits start

$CL #OOTT

Initial oil supply bump exitting strait over, inventory buffers nearing critical levels, product demand surging, Strait paralyzed again... what could go wrong.
#oott #IranWar‌
quoted_text: Since the Strait "opened" a surge of >80MM barrels exited heading for port. That is now over, with all but 1 of the 109 non-Iranian tankers having exited. What to watch now? INBOUND traffic, with only 1 vessel entering last night vs. a norm of ~50 and 7 day avg. only ~20% of normal. Without normalized inbound traffic onshore storage will remain filled and production constrained by ~5-8MM Bbl/d as Middle Eastern exports in July remain down 5.6MM Bbl/d, even with Fujairah/Yanbu workarounds.
